programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A melody holds the clue West needs to trap a departmental traitor.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Tom O'Neal and Ellen Howard want to get married, but their parents object, so Tom takes money from his father's savings and runs away with Ellen. They soon realize that that was an unwise decision."

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath is sent to a town endangered by a possible dam break. The town has been abandoned except for a few men who are there to guard against looters. Temptation gets the better of them, and they turn on Heath.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt searches for the real killer of Joe Silva when an old man is framed for the crime.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a local merchant is gunned down for refusing to pay off thugs who've taken over town, Farmer Perkins is charged with the crime and sentenced to hang. Ben is taken hostage by Perkins' employer, with threats to hang Ben if Perkins is not released.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Townspeople brace for the worst when a new girl arrives—with symptoms of smallpox.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into North Fork for a meeting with Lucas.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Monty Fox comes stumbling up to the night camp playing the concertina, saying he's found the promised land. He says he's found Quivera, Coronado's golden city. He says he'll share with those who help him against those who chased him out.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to find James Becker. He trails him to Monterey and discovers he has been arrested and is sentenced to work in a silver mine. Paladin finds that Becker has died in a cave-in or so he is told. The owner of the mine hires Paladin to guard a silver convoy, but first Paladin wants to find out a little more about the mine.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh and Jason go to Mexico searching for Al Hemp's brother, Billy. Al took the blame for Billy's crime and ends up waiting for his brother—a no show.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Three Little Beers, Dizzy Doctors, Tassels In The Air, Sing A Song Of Six Pants, Fiddlers Three, Rusty Romeos
programme.desc: "The Stooges are inept deliverymen at a brewery. , Larry, Curly and Moe make a grand mess of things when they mistake the medicine they're selling for auto polish. , The Stooges don't know it, but they are all engaged to the same girl, a gold-digger who plans to get an engagement ring from each of them and then abandon them. When all three show up at her house at the same time, a wild fight ensues, as each stooge accuses the others of making time with "his" girl. The gold-digger gets it in the end (literally) with tacks shot from a repeating rifle. [A remake of "Corny Casanovas".] , Moe pretends to be trendy interior designer. , "The stooges are tailors, and are heavily in debt to the Skin & Flint finance company. When the boys read about the big reward for a fugitive robber, they think it could be the answer to their problems. The bank robber conveniently ducks into their shop and leaves a suit with a safe combination. After his girl friend fails to retrieve it, the robber returns with gang and a wild fight ensues. The boys miss out on the reward but wind up with the crook's bankroll and can pay their creditors. " , The Stooges are musicians at the court of King Cole. When they ask the king's permission to marry their sweethearts, the King agrees, but only after Princess Alicia has married Prince Valiant. This news upsets Mergatroyd, an evil magician who plans to marry the Princess himself and rule the Kingdom. Mergatroyd abducts the Princess, and it's up to the Stooges to foil his plans and expose his evil doings. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A business commuter is pursued and terrorized by the malevolent driver of a massive tractor-trailer."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Using her hypnotic voice, the Siren sends Commissioner Gordon on a mission to find the location of the Batcave and Batman's secret identity.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise collides with a black hole and is thrown back to Earth in the 20th century, where they must find a way back to their timeline while erasing any trace of their presence.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: After being convinced to go straight, notorious gangster Rick Sable tips Jimmy off to a robbery his gang will commit.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: A professor invents a machine to transport people by telephone wire, and crooks use the machine to send Lois and Jimmy to Alaska.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: The Robinson men discover an underground civilization while exploring the planet. Will wakes a sleeping princess who wants him to remain and rule with her.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Exposure to radiation causes Nelson to be afflicted by the werewolf virus.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: A friendly Giant scientist tries to help the Earthlings with his teleporter, but the SID find out about his sympathies and set a trap.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In England, the time travelers try to help Merlin the magician secure the throne for young King Arthur.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A bombing and a suspicious man leads Vincent to question an official with possible alien connections.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Fish in Hoot Owl Creek are dying off and animals are falling ill as well. Adams,Jack and Nakoma decide it could be something in the water...but what and possibly who is caused it?"

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Death stalks the Florida Everglades. Not swift death by predators but a slow, agonizing death caused by drought and floods. Marlin and Jim visit the Everglades to investigate this problem first hand."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim journey to the high country of northern Mexico to explore the hills where the jaguar roams."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim journey to Rhodesia to join in a game relocation project with the rangers of Wankie National Park … a game preserve where all kinds of wild animals make their home. Two animals are on their list: a zebra and a giraffe."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Because of its inaccessibility to man and its climate, the South American jungles encourage the growth of its animal life. Marlin and Stan Brock go on an expedition to capture the largest of their kind and to see just why these jungle giants grow to such proportions."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Throughout the wild kingdom there are many examples of animal cooperation, and one of the most remarkable takes place in a picturesque little valley in southern Utah … home for families of badgers, bobcats, coyotes and golden eagles."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim journey to Kruger National Park in the Republic of South Africa to join the rangers there in an exciting wild elephant capture."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Mike's boss, Mr. Phillips, invites the Brady family on a fishing trip. However, when Cindy comes down with tonsillitis, the trip is postponed, to everyone's dismay. They try to keep an epidemic at bay in the Brady house.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Greg, tired of the antics of his younger siblings, thinks he should have his own room. Mike allows Greg to turn his den into his own room. This also leads to Greg dressing a whole new way and talking a whole new way, including calling his parents by their first names.

programme.title: Happy Days
programme.desc: Fonzie receives a Christmas gift from his father but is reluctant to accept and open it. Meanwhile, Richie and Lori Beth argue about what they've spent on each other's gifts, and Joanie is upset at Howard for getting an artificial tree.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Laverne and Shirley become hospital volunteers, or "candy stripers," and have a hard time as newbie nurses.

programme.title: A Very Merry Bugs Bunny Christmas
programme.sub-title: Bugs Bunny's Christmas Carol, Gift Wrapped, Abominable Snow Rabbit, Freeze Frame, Weasel While You Work, The Fright Before Christmas
programme.desc: "When Sam lacks the Christmas spirit, Bugs Bunny makes a plan to change his mind., It's Christmas time and Sylvester tries to switch his present with Granny's present which is Tweety in a birdcage., Bugs and Daffy decide to tunnel underground over to Palm Springs. Wrong directions end them up in the Himalayas where they run into trouble with the Abominable Snowman... , The coyote orders a blizzard machine to cover the entire desert with snow after he finds out that Road Runners are easy to catch in the cold. , During a snow-covered winter, Foghorn Leghorn uses the weasel against the barn's guard dog. , Taz breaks free of his a plane shipping crate and falls from the sky into Santa's laundry. He hijacks Santa's sleigh and ends up in Bugs' house tearing down everything, but Bugs gets wise to the Devil. "

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: A pet fair at school has Beaver feeling left out because he doesn't have a pet, but he tells everyone he does, a parrot. Meanwhile, Ward tries to find a pet for Beaver and buys him a hamster.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: An upcoming test in history, Wally's weakest subject, has Wally studying all weekend and has Larry and Eddie coming up with a plan that will give them good grades on the test.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are preparing for Christmas, but are lacking in one thing: Christmas spirit. Jed thinks it is because they aren’t doing anything special for anyone this Christmas. He thinks they should do something special for Mrs. Drysdale, unaware she is still trying to get rid of them. They try to get jobs to raise money for her gift, so she doesn’t find out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny gets a letter from Sam Drucker in Hooterville, but Elly's bear eats it. So after Granny finds very little success knowing if she is engaged or not, Jed, Granny and Elly all decide to spend Christmas in Hooterville.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: "The entire Brady family manages to overcome personal obstacles to spend a happy holiday together."

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Mickey Rooney plays a mystical Christmas presence among a motley group of passengers.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney visit the Darlings to rid them of Ernest T. Bass, who has his mind set on marrying daughter Charlene.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Gus Lopez's out-of-this-world, Star Wars collection includes Han Solo's screen-used jacket, C-3PO's body parts, and the screen-used DEATH STAR! Expert Rob Klein attempts to make a trade with Gus, by bringing him a special Star Wars collectible that may not be familiar to every Star Wars fan."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester fulfills a family Christmas tradition but has trouble maintaining the anonymity required to keep it a truly charitable act. Even Klinger lends a hand.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: To boost post-yuletide morale on Dec 26, Potter has the officers and enlisted men change places for the day.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith's religious faith is shaken after her friend, female impersonator Beverly LaSalle, is brutally murdered by street thugs at Christmas.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike is put in the hospital and Beverly LaSalle is murdered by a thug at Chistmas.

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: The Christmas season has the Evans family in the spirit and planning a Christmas Eve party. Meanwhile, while Christmas shopping for her mother, Penny gets her wallet stolen, and later steals a necklace from a department store in a desperate attempt to try

programme.title: Good Times
programme.desc: When Keith's Scrooge-like boss at the taxi-cab company won't give him Christmas off, the Evans family brings their Christmas party to Keith and holds at the company. J.J. hosts the festivities and it features Michael singing, Bookman (dressed as Santa) da

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is mortified when he meets a girl he dated 25 years earlier.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when Robert starts dating a girl half his age.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Buddy's stay at the Petries causes endless problems.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Richie isn't happy when Rob is awarded "Father of the Week".

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph feeds his boss dog food, thinking that it is an appetizer that Alice made.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After being shot to death, a gangster finds himself in a place where he gets everything his heart desires.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A neighbor's letter about an unfaithful wife disturbs an advice columnist.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF plots to bring down a corrupt music producer who murdered a singer he had under contract through manipulating his equally unscrupulous partner.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.sub-title: Set Fire To A Straw Man
programme.desc: Kimble reluctantly becomes involved with Stella Savano, the sister of George Savano, a mobster who runs the trucking company where Kimble works. Stella is an emotionally disturbed woman with a dangerous attraction to Johnny, the adopted eight-year-old son

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "A slaying in a black ghetto finds Harry Orwell relying on a blind "eyewitness" to zero in on the killer."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives crack down on wildcatters—freelance tow-truck drivers who victimize motorists.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday's apartment party provides insight into the nature of an officer's private life.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: As part of a trial program, Malloy and Reed team with Motor Officer Grant to better combat crime. Out on patrol, they make a safety check at a residence, investigate a suspicious witness at the scene of a traffic accident, deal with a young member of a neighborhood watch, respond to an annoying complaint about illegally parked cars and perform a daylight stakeout to catch a serial burglar.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: An anonymous call of shots fired over the radio leads to an 'Emergency!' roll call and frantic search for Motor Officer Grant. Meanwhile, Malloy and Reed respond to a citizen report of an armed robbery in progress at a bar, and Reed goes undercover as a pizza delivery driver to bust a dangerous scam.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Mr. Quizzer is back again with a holiday edition of his new game show, "Catch The Connection." Bill, Toony and viewers will have to guess what all five of the cartoons have in common."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward allows Beaver to check out a book on his library card but when Beaver loses the book he becomes convinced that Ward will be put in jail, thanks to Eddie Haskell's wiseguy comments.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Eddie nominates Wally for class president but Wally has no interest in the position; that is until Ward gives him some encouragement. Wally quickly gets wrapped up in the election and his friends see a change in him—a change that prompts them to vote against him.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Ill-fated Faker
programme.desc: Jim Ferris is having an affair with his uncle's bored young wife. They concoct a scheme to finagle $80,000 from the man by faking a kidnapping. It doesn't take long before things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When an actress is murdered, Matlock represents her director in a community theatre play—on the grounds that Matlock won't be cut from his role in the production!

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A restaurateur and her mechanic boyfriend plot to eliminate her husband, but their scheme backfires. Gillespie takes heat over a string of mailbox bashings. And Virgil soon regrets ignoring Parker's theory regarding where the vandals would strike next.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Corabeth finds a romantic letter in Ike's belongings and wants a divorce

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When someone is scalped in Dodge, the townsfolk are eager to blame the Indians.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: After taking part in robbing the Virginia City bank, Sam Kirby gets hired at the Ponderosa, moonlighting as a farm hand while waiting to hear when the townsfolk have given up searching for the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou looks for a way out when the man her dying father promised her to arrives.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Duke and Charlie leave the train for supplies and to see Duke's old friends at a fort. One is a minister who was cashiered out of the Army who is trying to create peace with the Modocs despite a Major who only wants to kill all Indians."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A child is trapped in a car under downed power lines. A stockbroker with heart problems is reluctant to be treated. An elderly woman that Roy and John treated the previous year dies and remembers them in her will. Dr. Early administers first aid to two young boys. A teenager loses a hamburger eating contest. The Paramedics treat a burn victim at an explosive fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A clumsy foot soldier, "Look Out Below" Conway, finds the quickest way to the crew's heart, boosting morale at the 4077th by cooking gourmet delights. Only Colonel Potter, burdened with a personal crisis, is immune from the high spirits enveloping the hospital.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A Congressional aide, Williamson, visits the 4077th on a supposedly routine fact-finding tour, but it's discovered that his motives are far deeper—too uncover Margaret as a communist sympathizer. His case is full of innuendo, so the gang set out to help Margaret.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The arrival of a wounded Korean woman sparks a conflict at the 4077th: Hawkeye wants to heal her, but a steely ROK officer, Lt. Park, is more anxious to "question" her about alleged guerilla activities.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On leave in Tokyo, Radar is desperately needed back at the crisis-stricken 4077th, but his return is delayed by outside events. While casualties continue to pour in from the front, the 4077th's generator conks out, and the backup has been stolen.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When the state police leave two captured bank robbers in the custody of the Mayberry police department overnight, Barney is determined to show the prisoners that the Mayberry jail is as good as any other.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a mother bird with his new slingshot and takes it upon himself to raise the orphaned baby birds. After adopting them, Opie faces the difficult task of setting them free.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray fears that he is going to come down with something dreadful.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray questions his manliness.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Klink that the kommandant is a great painter so the prisoners can meet an underground contact at an art gallery.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Gestapo takes over Stalag 13, planning to send Klink and Schultz to the Russian Front.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests Paul Sand And Eydie Gorme
programme.desc: In The Parolee, an just released parole tries to calm his girlfriend down before she makes a scene and gets him thrown back in jail. Then, in Salute to the Movie Series, the gang parodies classic entertainment, including "Young Dr. Kildaire", "The Cisco Kid", and "The Latin Bombshell". Finally, in The Wolfman, Carol and friends poke fun at horror movie cliches with a haunted castle, gypsy, and a wolfman.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Drowning Duck
programme.desc: Donald Briggs is an unscrupulous private investigator hired by Clyde Waters to uncover information about Marv Adams, his daughter's fiance. Briggs learns that Marv Adams' father was Ben Devereaux, who was convicted of murder 18 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A schoolteacher finds a strange and very serious little girl on the stairs outside her apartment. The girl seems to know her, and tries to jog her memory about a man she saw earlier that day.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A doctor plans to marry a good-looking soloist despite warnings that her three ex-husbands all experienced brutal deaths.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: While investigating the location of a missing person, Joe uncovers the death of a colleague who appears to have committed suicide.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired by a Cuban exile to investigate the death of the man's brother at the hands of law enforcement officials.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: An insurance settlement hangs on the result of an investigation of a motorcycle manufacturer's death.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives tackle cases for the department's robbery division.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Police and Secret Service undertake maximum security for a Presidential visit to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy tries to find a way to help a 60-year-old career criminal he arrested 10 years ago, who was recently released and begs to be re-arrested so he can spend his retirement years in the federal penitentiary. Meanwhile, he and Reed become suspicious while investigating an apparent home burglary, and later respond to a bank robbery in progress.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Sgt. MacDonald is suffering a marital crisis and turns to Malloy for advice. On today's patrol, a female cashier is taken hostage inside a grocery store by a couple of trigger-happy robbers who attempt to escape on the roof, and an elderly woman turns up missing from her retirement home.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.sub-title: Rival Of The Ages: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: "We're pitting Boomer versus Zoomer to see which generation reigns supreme with holiday challenges."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: An old acquaintance of Ward's stops by and offers to paint the trim on the house. However, June and Ward are both apprehensive about the prospect of an alcoholic coming in contact with Wally and Beaver, despite the fact that he says he's cleaned himself up.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Both Beaver and Larry are forced into attending dancing school by their parents and after one lesson, they find that they absolutely detest it, like they knew they would. This prompts them to skip class next time and they hide out behind a barn until it's time to go home.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Singular Double
programme.desc: Mason is accused of obstructing justice when he defends a woman who had faked her own suicide by running an empty car off a cliff. It seems as though the police found the body of another woman in the wreckage.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock defends a Vietnamese fisherman and his son when they are accused of murdering a racist fisherman. And It isn't just the fishermen that Matlock ends up defending, as he, too, becomes a target of the racist townspeople.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: V.J. Trundel's widow takes Harriet to court to gain custody of Eric. But Harriet is determined that her nephew will not be raised in the home of the man who ordered the murder of her sister.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Rose and Stanley plan to get married.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: When a new doctor arrives in Dodge, his wife starts a smear campaign against Doc Adams.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss befriends an old drunk named Charlie Trent, who at one time had been the best scout the Army had. When the Army's current scout, Lewt Cutter, refuses to obey Captain Pender's orders, he is fired and replaced by Charlie, whom the captain knew from his earlier days.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is less than anxious to display his prowess.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Hale is entrusted to deliver $8,000 to a bank. Young David Garner is determined to steal it and he stows along on the wagon train, along with a girl who's in love with him. Following them is a shady man who seems to have a hold over David."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A woman screams for therapeutic reasons. When the paramedics are interviewed on a TV program, Johnny freezes in front of the camera and Roy must bail him out. A young boy attempts suicide by leaping off an apartment ledge at the hospital; the doctors suspect he may be an abused child. The paramedics rescue a man trapped in a doughnut machine and a child from a fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: As company clerk Radar O'Reilly reluctantly prepares to depart the 4077th, the unit is still without electricity due to a broken generator, and the operating room continues to fill up with war wounded as night falls.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger and B.J. both have Radar-related woes, causing them to go on a drinking binge. A drunken B.J. becomes violent with Hawkeye.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A beautiful and ambitious young nurse, Harris, who plans to become a doctor when she leaves the Army, finds herself in a misunderstanding with Father Mulcahy. Meanwhile, the camp's water supply is depleted, and the rest of the 4077th is more concerned about where their next shower will come from.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A South Korean woman misinterprets Klinger's motives when he tries to help her daughter financially. Meanwhile, Hawkeye wrestles with his conscience over a promise made to a dying soldier, Eddie Hastings.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.sub-title: Ernest T. Bass Joins The Army
programme.desc: Ernest T. wants to join the Army to impress a girl with the uniform. When he is refused induction, he goes on a window-breaking rampage.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher gives a sermon about taking time to relax. In trying to create an atmosphere of relaxation on a Sunday afternoon, the townsfolk all end up running themselves ragged.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray must choose who will accompany him to the Super Bowl.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is mortified when he realizes that Marie used to read his journal.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Schultz lets his new power as camp kommandant go to his head.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Eight O'clock And All Is Well
programme.desc: Hogan finds that a new prisoner is a German spy right after he tells the man all about their secret operations.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Computer Date, Carol meets a blind date who knows as many fun facts as she does. Then, in Tacky Song, Carol plays a dowdy librarian singing "The Lady Is a Tramp". Finally, in Dr. Jekyll and Ms. Hyde, a doctor's experiment goes horribly wrong when he continually turns into his female alter ego.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Sulky Girl
programme.desc: An impetuous niece who demands her trust fund be released comes to Mason for help. But it's her boyfriend who needs defending when he is charged with murdering her controlling uncle.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Riding home from work on a train, a stressed-out man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880 and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A police officer concocts a grim preparation to punish the killer of his son, a recruit cop.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: When two crop-dusting pilots disappear, Mannix is hired to find them.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Frank Cannon believes that this time he has accepted a peaceful job. He must protect the bar of a friend, Millie Carroll, against robberies. However, suddenly he finds himself amid a complex love story.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby must find out what happened to a woman who disappeared after dating a country singer's ex.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday clashes with a woman writer gathering research material for an article on policewomen.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to get citizens to take part in a crime-prevention campaign.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed join forces with Sgt. Gloria Tyler to search for a rapist who attacks teen girls.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed lead a house-to-house search for a missing six-year-old girl, and what Malloy does after discovering the horrible things that have happened to her could short-circuit his career ambitions. Meanwhile, they come to the aid of a man who's gotten stuck in a storm sewer.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.sub-title: Mr. Quizzer's Trivia Hour: Holiday Edition
programme.desc: "Mr. Quizzer presents an hour of holiday trivia along with festive cartoons."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Larry is furious when Beaver leaves him out when he joins a club called the Bloody Five. To get revenge, Larry makes up a story that he is starting his own club and that people are waiting in line to join. This prompts Beaver to resign from the Bloody Five and he tries to join Larry's bogus club.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally lends his school sweater to Frances and quickly finds getting it back is going to be difficult because the girl keeps making up excuses. Things reach a boiling point when Ward and June overhear Frances bragging to her friends how Wally is chasing after her.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lavender Lipstick
programme.desc: A heiress to a cosmetics company is charged with the murder of the company's owner.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a troubled young woman is accused of murder, her late father's former business partner hires Matlock to prove her innocence.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie learns that the son of an old friend is a compulsive gambler. The young man wants his father to pay off his losses. But when two gangsters show up from New Orleans to collect, his jealous sibling sees the perfect opportunity to get rid of his troubled brother.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A new company starts in the area and wants to sell wood to the Waltons.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A grateful family wants Matt to marry their daughter.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam is rescued from an ambush by Gerald Eskith, a lawman who is on a mission to Virginia City. Eskith is looking for a man who happens to be married to a close friend of the Cartwrights. By the time Adam realizes Eskith's real agenda, it may be too late to save someone's life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A speculator will stop at nothing to grab Lucas's land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark blames himself for a friend's accidental death.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Bill Hawks travels to a desert town to visit an old friend, an indian who has a ranch there. However, upon arriving on his friend's property, he discovers that it is under the control of the local townspeople, who are drilling for water, and that his friend is nowhere to be seen. The townspeople are unwilling to give him any information, and in fact display outright hostility towards him, leading Hawks to suspect that his friend may be in danger or even dead.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Responding to a vehicle fire, the firemen discover a catatonic mechanic; at Rampart the doctors are mystified by his condition. Roy lectures a woman who keeps calling the paramedics because she is lonely. A woman mixes ammonia with bleach and inhales poisonous gas. An elderly couple is trapped in their house by a bunch of tumbleweeds.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Charles returns to the 4077th after a trip to Tokyo with an uncharacteristic hangover and the uneasy feeling of a romantic entanglement. Meanwhile, the hospital struggles to find a cure for an outbreak of deadly hemorrhagic fever.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye and B.J. race against the clock to save a soldier from paralysis. B.J.'s harvesting an aorta from a dead soldier doesn't sit well with the soldier's friend.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger discovers that his duties as company clerk include catering to the eccentric whims of the 4077th officers. Consequently, the unusual demands by Klinger's superiors leave little time to write a letter home to Toledo.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A brawl at Rosie's Bar puts Rosie in the hospital, and the 4077th doctors are pressed into service as temporary saloon-keepers. Meanwhile, Father Mulcahy is apprehensive that his long-pending promotion to captain will again be denied.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Briscoe Darling becomes obsessed with Aunt Bee after hearing her recite a poem, going as far as to kidnap her and bring her back to his shack in the hills.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy takes Gomer in after Wally fires him for not doing his job right. Gomer proceeds to drive Andy, Aunt Bee and Opie crazy with all of the noise he makes.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra realizes that her and Ray, no longer have anything to say to one another.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is upset when he discovers that his twins, are playing fairies in the school play.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan is ordered to photograph and destroy a model for a radio-controlled tank that is being tested at camp.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A dynamite truck, which Hogan plans on hi-jacking, deviates from its planned route.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Carol and Sis, Carol and Harvey fight in front of an encounter group. Then, in Fun in a Saloon, a western bad guy starts a dancing brawl. Finally, in Court Stenographer, Carol plays a recorder who can't help but interfere with the court case.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Silent Partner
programme.desc: Harry Bright and Chuck Clark were once best friends and business partners, until Margaret entered the picture. Margaret, a young woman on the make, entranced Chuck into marrying her. When Margaret is found shot to death, Harry is arrested.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man, desperate to win the affection of a beautiful woman, slips her a love potion.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.sub-title: A Home Away From Home (s2, ep)
programme.desc: When a mental institution patient imprisons the staff, he reverses the roles of doctors and patients.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.sub-title: Beyond The Shadow Of A Dream
programme.desc: A mentally unstable woman is having trouble grasping the difference between nightmare and reality. Mannix is hired to figure which of her companions is creating her confusion.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: An illegal immigrant from Mexico has died in a coyote's case. Sheep grower Rita McBain is accused of the deed. Cannon must prove Rita's innocence and deal with a human smuggler ring.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: When a dinner guest falls asleep, his host steals his diamond.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A businessman's war against drug addiction results in a new group whose motto is "freaking out isn't in."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Martin Milner and Kent McCord appear as Officers Malloy and Reed to portray the policeman's role in society.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: "A drunk's antics appear harmless at first; a stakeout uncovers a cash stash."

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After his wife's credit card is turned down attempting to buy a washing machine, an irate Reed begins a long and painful process with his bank to get his credit rating corrected. Out on patrol, he and Malloy investigate a parking lot hit-and-run accident based on the victim's recollection of the perpetrator's license plate number, search for two runaways who steal camping gear from a store's basement and make a rare mistake after responding to a liquor store robbery.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony enjoy the holiday splendor of the 1960s with nostalgic party food, vintage crafting and more!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After seeing someone being hypnotized in a movie, Beaver sets out to do the same. He tries hypnotism on Eddie—who pretends Beaver has hypnotized him—and Beaver gets scared when Eddie won't snap out of the trance.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After drawing Alma's name for a school picnic, Wally finds himself meeting her parents and her mother takes an immediate liking to Wally, setting him and Alma up on numerous dates, but then turns around and accuses Wally of monopolizing Alma's time.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Wandering Widow
programme.desc: When a man accused of a murder is freed from prison upon newly discovered eyewitness testimony, it starts a chain reaction of blackmail and murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Matlock's new neighbor, Les "Ace" Calhoun (Don Knotts), is charged with murdering the used car salesman who sold him a lemon, Matlock takes the case to prove that more than one person had a motive.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An ex-convict attempts to retrieve his loot from his wife and her new husband in this tongue-in-cheek episode.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: One of Mary Ellen's mountain patient dies, leaving his young teen to the helping hand

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Kitty and an unmarried expectant mother end up stranded in the desert when bandits attack their stagecoach.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben's neighbor, Joyce, comes to the Ponderosa asking Ben to help her disabled husband build a mill. She thinks the project will help her husband break free from his depression and the grip of a man named Ezekiel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson, North Fork's blacksmith, volunteers to take the marshal's place for a few days while Micah attends a wedding in another town. To help maintain peace, Nils institutes a policy that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons, getting them back when they leave. This plan backfires on Nils when some dishonest men come to town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Invalid rancher Henry Ludlow is so determined that daughter Judy not marry Basque sheepherder Antone Rose that he sells his land and joins the wagon train to head west. When Antone learns of this, he joins the train as well to marry her."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: A crop-duster makes a rough landing in a field; the pilot suffers a punctured lung, and a bystander is poisoned with pesticide. A patient reports to Rampart with an ear infection caused by mothballs. A couple overdoses on daffodil bulbs. A weekend cowboy refuses treatment after falling from his horse. Two victims of a traffic accident get friendly. The lead singer of a rock band goes into cardiac arrest.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Friction arises between B.J. and Winchester when they are asked to write an article for a prestigious medical journal on how they saved a soldier's life with a daring operation. Meanwhile, Hot Lips receives an eventful visit from Scully.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A baby born to a Korean woman and an American GI is abandoned at the 4077th. Knowing that Amer-Asian children are often mistreated in Korean society, the troop sets about the frustrating task of finding a new home for the infant.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Horrified by the gigantic size of his monthly bar tab at the officer's club, Hawkeye vows to give up booze for a week. Meanwhile, Winchester desperately tries to halt his sister's impending marriage to a man he considers unworthy of the Winchester heritage.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter turns crotchety when he catches the mumps, and his condition is worsened when Winchester gets the same disease and has to be quarantined with him. A temporary replacement surgeon, Newsome, is quickly brought into the 4077th and seems to be a gem in terms of both personality and ability.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney are to protect a shipment of gold passing through Mayberry. It's critical that they keep it a secret, but Barney spills the beans immediately and soon all the town knows.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie is given a bike after bringing home a report card filled with straight As. He soon discovers that the high marks were a mistake.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert gets a surprise visit from Stefania.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray purchases a new state-of-the-art vacuum cleaner.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men try to rescue an underground leader on route to Berlin to be executed.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan uses Klink's car radio to sneak a message to London when a pair of radio detection trucks enters the area.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Double Calamity, the gang parodies the film-noir classic "Double Indemnity", with Carol as Barbara Stanwyck and Steve as Fred McMurray.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Angry Mourner
programme.desc: Carla Adrian is having trouble fending off amorous neighbor Mark Cushing. When another neighbor hears a shot and a woman's scream in Mark Cushing's cabin, it's not long before the police discover Cushing's dead body and arrest Mrs. Belle Adrian.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Convinced he'll never amount to anything, a trumpet player attempts suicide and then finds himself in a world where no one can hear or see him.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An adulterous partner is caught between a drunken husband and a determined lover.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is stuck in a farm town with an injured foot, and a group of citizens who seem to be keeping a deadly secret from him.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Dr. Simeon is accused by orderly Duran of stealing drugs in the Metropolitan Hospital . Cannon has to find out whether this is right.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A cattleman is murdered in his own corral on the day he was to withdraw his money from the bank.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A conference provokes old-line policemen to reassess their attitudes, particularly toward minority groups.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A 91-year-old apartment-house manager gets involved in a murder investigation.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While paying a visit to the laundromat before going into work, Malloy encounters a man using the facilities to dry something much different from clothing. On patrol, he and Reed deal with a minister-in-training who uses a very unorthodox method to get his message across, try to reunite a Finnish-speaking child with her family, mediate a strange dispute between feuding neighbors and engage in a high-speed chase with a well known drug dealer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed investigate a large car theft operation that targets older cars, then stages them around the city as abandoned vehicles so they can be towed and scrapped. Meanwhile, they try to figure out why the son of Malloy's girlfriend is getting bad grades, search for a suspect who robbed an elderly woman and attempt to rescue two foolish teenagers who enter a house that is being fumigated.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony explore regional holiday eats, treats, and traditions around America!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver asks his parents if he could ride his new bike to school instead of the bus, and after some hesitating they finally agree to it. However, on the first day, a naive Beaver gets his bike stolen.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally asks out a rich girl who drops hints that she would like an orchid for her corsage. Wally quickly discovers that getting one is going to be more difficult then he originally thought.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Clumsy Clown
programme.desc: Two owners of a circus are trying to buy out each other. Both also are after a clown in the circus for the funds. The second owner is blackmailing him regarding his wife's second marriage.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend Laura McCord after she's charged with murdering her husband, David, in a jealous rage. Matlock and Julie soon realize that David's lover is the key to the case, but she seems to have disappeared.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A political prisoner who entered the country illegally, seeks sanctuary in a monastery. Gillespie and Tibbs find themselves at odds with Sheriff McComb when they try to help the man.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy returns to New York with a new book - that is not good

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A lawman-hater causes trouble for Matt and a retired marshal.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While in Virginia City on ranch business, Adam meets up with Sam Board. As they are leaving town, they come across a wagon train and decide to help the settlers out. Adam finds himself falling for the daughter of the group's leader, but soon finds that love doesn't always overcome morals and beliefs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Railroad gang boss John Gangling kills one of his crew to rob him of his savings. To cover his tracks, Gangling puts the blame on Johnny Wing, an Apache worker.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: On the road Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down, and help him get his wagon into North Fork for repair. While in North Fork Quince barters several items that implicate him in a series of murders.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: "Duke Shannon returns to check on his small ranch he split evenly with a childhood friend. When he arrives he finds tenant farmers being bull-whipped and a ruthless foreman his partner does not want to fire claiming he is needed."

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: At an explosive fire, a girl's horse is trapped in a burning barn. Dr. Brackett and Nurse McCall lecture a man who keeps forgetting his insulin shots. A girl calls the hospital, threatening suicide; firemen stand by while hospital workers attempt to trace the call. A hostage in a bank robbery has heart problems; the paramedics must treat him at gunpoint.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is appointed temporary commander of the 4077th when Colonel Potter rushes off to Tokyo on a mysterious mission. While in command, Hawkeye's main problem is housing a large group of Korean refugees comprised mainly of rambunctious children who need medical care.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Tired of their constant complaints about the quality of recreational activities at the 4077th, Colonel Potter appoints Hawkeye and B.J. as the new morale officers. Winchester's morale has already reached a new peak: He's ecstatic about his operation on a wounded soldier, Sheridan, which saved the boy's leg, leaving only "negligible" side effects—less use of his right hand. However, the soldier was a concert pianist before the war.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Irritated that the 4077th is planning a "surprise" party for him, Hawkeye volunteers to go to the aid of a wounded surgeon at the front. An additional irritant to Hawkeye is the arrival of Dr. Borelli, a wisecracking medical advisor with whom he habitually disagrees.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger redecorates his quarters, but the resultant ridicule he receives drives him to new heights in his efforts to get out of the Army. Meanwhile, the doctors are perplexed by the reaction of an Asian-American war hero who tries to kill himself.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gomer is asked by Andy and Barney to take Thelma Lou's cousin, Mary Grace Gossage, to the Chamber of Commerce dance.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After being kicked out of Mrs. Mendlebright's boardinghouse, Barney becomes suspicious of the man who takes his room.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Tempers flare when Marie accuses Debra of not returning a canister.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra becomes angry when Ray contributes $1,000 to his friends' scheme.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In an effort to transport a German anti-radar to London, Hogan passes LeBeau off as a fortune teller after convincing Klink he was struck by lightning.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan helps three German scientists escape to England.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Opening Talk on Plane, passengers discuss their plans in Australia. Then, Carol and friends perform "Waltzing Matilda" and "It's Today". Next, in The Oldest Man, the Sydney orchestra is led by the Oldest Man. Finally, in The Ham Actor, an ailing Carol tries to perform, despite already being replaced by Vicki.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Crimson Kiss
programme.desc: Fay Allison is getting married in a few days to Dane Grover. Her roommate, Anita Bonsal, is having a clandestine affair with a married man, Carver Clement. When Aunt Louise arrives early one morning to see Fay, she finds Fay and Anita both unconscious.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An eccentric loser gets a new life from his guardian angel, but there is a price to keeping it.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A pious extremist embarks on a killing spree to retaliate for the death of his son.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is on the middle of a fence when it comes to an intense child custody case, in which he is working for the mother while seeing the father dash attempts on his life.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Paul Stubber taps the computer of the railroad company to be able to rob cars with valuable goods. However, nothing can be proved against him. Cannon finds Stubber's weak spot: The crook fights for the right to keep his son.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A newsman takes pictures of evidence showing that an industrialist is involved with the mob.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Steve's Uncle George visits the Shady Rest hotel and lives up to his reputation as a troublemaker.
